name: agentify
description: Bootstrap a production-grade agentic harness on any Claude Code repository. Configurable per target via agentify.config.json (company, skill prefix, plugin name, marketplace URL, fleet size, loop path root, ticket prefix).

commands.name: agentify
commands.description: Bootstrap a target Claude Code repository with the agentify harness (rendering, config, hooks, skills).

commands.name: agt-config
commands.description: Inspect and edit agentify.config.json with schema validation.

commands.name: agt-feedback
commands.description: File community feedback against the agentify marketplace upstream.

commands.name: agt-self-improve
commands.description: Audit the target (or marketplace, when run here) and emit a finding-schema-conformant audit document.

commands.name: agt-upgrade
commands.description: Plan and apply migrations between agentify plugin versions, with rollback.

commands.name: agt-charter
commands.description: Lifecycle phase 0 — set or amend the project charter (mission, principles, constraints, lifecycle expectations). Routes through lib/task_backend.sh so markdown/Jira/Notion/Linear backends are interchangeable.

commands.name: agt-brainstorm
commands.description: Lifecycle phase 1 — open-ended exploration before a PRD exists. Captures alternatives, tradeoffs, open questions, tentative direction.

commands.name: agt-prd
commands.description: Lifecycle phase 2 — promote a brainstorm to a Product Requirements Document with falsifiable acceptance criteria.

commands.name: agt-clarify
commands.description: Lifecycle phase 3 — interactive sequential clarification of underspecified PRD areas with a logged Q&A trail.

commands.name: agt-plan
commands.description: Lifecycle phase 4 — translate an approved PRD into a technical implementation plan (files, dependencies, risks, verification).

commands.name: agt-tasks
commands.description: Lifecycle phase 5 — decompose an approved plan into ordered tasks under the ≤5×7 + falsifiable-Validation + per-phase-Checkpoint discipline.

commands.name: agt-implement
commands.description: Lifecycle phase 6 — execute the tasks of a plan in order, delegating each to /agt-loop and updating task state through the task-backend.
